data.title: NIO Q4 Earnings: Revenue & EPS Miss, 45% Delivery Growth, Margin Gains And More
data.description: Chinese EV maker NIO reports Q4 revenue of 19.70 billion yuan, up 15.2% Y/Y and 5.5% Q/Q. Vehicle deliveries increase 45.2% Y/Y.

data.title: What's Going On With Microchip Technology Stock Today?
data.description: Microchip Technology is trading flat in the premarket after pricing a $1.35 billion public offering, with proceeds primarily for debt repayment, while also expanding into the electric two-wheeler market with new scalable solutions.

data.title: Trump Invokes An Act From 1950s To Boost Domestic Mineral Industry
data.description: Trump invokes DPA to boost domestic mineral industry, citing national security concerns. Expands list of priority minerals to include uranium.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson To Invest $55 Billion In US To Boost Manufacturing, Drug Discovery
data.description: Johnson & Johnson has announced a $55 billion investment in the U.S. over the next four years. This move will boost American manufacturing, research, and development, creating high-tech jobs and expanding facilities.

data.title: Tether Is Now 'Too Big To Fail,' Says Anthony Pompliano: Here's Why
